title: Fantastic Smelting
description:
A small mod to boost your smelting-experience.
Allows you to smelt raw resource blocks, saving you time and space.
body:
A small mod to boost your smelting-experience.
Allows you to smelt raw resource blocks, saving you time and space.

- Reduces smelting times by 25%
- Saves you about 90% space
- Reduces XP-gain by about 45%

Works for, both furnace and blast furnace.
